notes: Stress queries designed to probe Qwen phase understanding, early boundary localization, and interaction grouping.

queries.text_en: The glass cup before any coffee is poured.
The lemon at the first moment it becomes two separate halves.
The cookie exactly when the first visible crack appears.
Everything that directly participates in pouring coffee into the martini glass.
queries.purpose: interaction group selection under DyNeRF layout

queries.text_en: The torch at the exact time it begins roaming over the steak.
queries.purpose: tool-action onset localization under DyNeRF layout
